topics.name: Speech Separation and Target Speaker Extraction

papers.title: Generative Pre-training for Speech with Flow Matching
papers.summary: Generative models have gained more and more attention in recent years for their remarkable success in tasks that required estimating and sampling data distribution to generate high-fidelity synthetic data. In speech, text-to-speech synthesis and neural vocoder are good examples where generative models have shined. While generative models have been applied to different applications in speech, there exists no general-purpose generative model that models speech directly. In this work, we take a step toward this direction by showing a single pre-trained generative model can be adapted to different downstream tasks with strong performance. Specifically, we pre-trained a generative model, named SpeechFlow, on 60k hours of untranscribed speech with Flow Matching and masked conditions. Experiment results show the pre-trained generative model can be fine-tuned with task-specific data to match or surpass existing expert models on speech enhancement, separation, and synthesis. Our work suggested a foundational model for generation tasks in speech can be built with generative pre-training.
papers.justification: 论文提出SpeechFlow，采用Flow Matching预训练语音生成模型，可微调用于语音增强、分离和合成，与生成式语音技术方向高度相关，方法新颖且具基础性，是必读级别工作。

chinese_summary.problem: 当前语音生成模型多为任务专用，缺乏统一预训练的基础生成模型，难以通用和共享知识。
chinese_summary.method: 提出SpeechFlow，在60k小时未转录语音上使用Flow Matching和masked条件进行生成预训练；下游任务通过微调适配，覆盖语音增强、分离和合成。
chinese_summary.innovation: 首次证明单一预训练生成模型可适应多个语音下游任务（增强、分离、合成）且性能优异；引入Flow Matching实现大规模无监督语音生成预训练，填补通用语音生成基础模型的空白。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要声称在语音增强、分离和合成任务上微调后匹配或超越现有专家模型，但未提供具体量化指标或比较细节，证据强度有限。
chinese_summary.limitations: 未披露实验设置、数据集细节、与baseline的精确对比，masked condition的具体设计需全文确认；泛化到未见任务（如语音修复、带宽扩展）的潜力存疑。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 论文直接采用Flow Matching进行语音生成预训练，并示范在语音增强、分离和合成上的应用，完美匹配我的研究方向中'generative speech enhancement'、'speech synthesis'、'flow matching speech'等关键词，且'generative pre-training'思路对构建通用生成模型极具参考价值。

papers.title: SpatialNet: Extensively Learning Spatial Information for Multichannel Joint Speech Separation, Denoising and Dereverberation
papers.summary: This work proposes a neural network to extensively exploit spatial information for multichannel joint speech separation, denoising and dereverberation, named SpatialNet. In the short-time Fourier transform (STFT) domain, the proposed network performs end-to-end speech enhancement. It is mainly composed of interleaved narrow-band and cross-band blocks to respectively exploit narrow-band and cross-band spatial information. The narrow-band blocks process frequencies independently, and use self-attention mechanism and temporal convolutional layers to respectively perform spatial-feature-based speaker clustering and temporal smoothing/filtering. The cross-band blocks process frames independently, and use full-band linear layer and frequency convolutional layers to respectively learn the correlation between all frequencies and adjacent frequencies. Experiments are conducted on various simulated and real datasets, and the results show that 1) the proposed network achieves the state-of-the-art performance on almost all tasks; 2) the proposed network suffers little from the spectral generalization problem; and 3) the proposed network is indeed performing speaker clustering (demonstrated by attention maps).
categories: IEEE/ACM Transactions on Audio Speech and Language Processing
papers.venue: IEEE/ACM Transactions on Audio Speech and Language Processing
papers.topic_name: Speech Separation and Target Speaker Extraction
papers.justification: 该论文提出SpatialNet，有效利用空间信息进行多通道语音分离、去噪和去混响，与研究方向高度相关，方法新颖且具有影响力，符合经典赛道必读级。研究方向涉及Speech Separation和Microphone Array。

chinese_summary.problem: 解决多通道场景下语音分离、去噪和去混响的联合处理问题，充分利用空间信息提升性能。
chinese_summary.method: 提出SpatialNet，在STFT域进行端到端增强，由交错的窄带和跨波段模块组成：窄带模块独立处理每个频率，使用自注意力机制进行空间特征驱动的说话者聚类，时间卷积层进行时域平滑/滤波；跨波段模块独立处理每个时间帧，使用全频带线性层学习所有频率间的相关性，频率卷积层学习相邻频率的相关性。
chinese_summary.innovation: 1) 将空间信息在窄带和跨波段两个维度上分别建模，窄带模块实现基于空间特征的聚类，跨波段模块学习频率间依赖；2) 自注意力机制显式用于说话者聚类并通过注意力图可视化验证；3) 在多种模拟和真实数据集上实现近乎所有任务的当前最佳性能，且显著缓解了频谱泛化问题。
chinese_summary.evidence: 在多种模拟和真实数据集上的实验表明：1) 几乎所有任务达到SOTA；2) 频谱泛化问题小；3) 通过注意力图证明网络确实执行了说话者聚类。
chinese_summary.limitations: 摘要未提及计算复杂度、实际部署实时性、对极低信噪比或强混响场景的鲁棒性，且未明确说明训练数据配置（如麦克风数量、阵列几何等）。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 论文聚焦语音分离与目标说话人提取的核心问题（语音分离），提出基于空间信息的多通道端到端方法，直接匹配研究方向中的source separation、speech separation、masking model及time-frequency分离方法，且自注意力聚类机制与speaker extraction场景高度相关。

papers.title: URGENT Challenge: Universality, Robustness, and Generalizability For Speech Enhancement
papers.summary: The last decade has witnessed significant advancements in deep learning-based speech enhancement (SE). However, most existing SE research has limitations on the coverage of SE sub-tasks, data diversity and amount, and evaluation metrics. To fill this gap and promote research toward universal SE, we establish a new SE challenge, named URGENT, to focus on the universality, robustness, and generalizability of SE. We aim to extend the SE definition to cover different sub-tasks to explore the limits of SE models, starting from denoising, dereverberation, bandwidth extension, and declipping. A novel framework is proposed to unify all these sub-tasks in a single model, allowing the use of all existing SE approaches. We collected public speech and noise data from different domains to construct diverse evaluation data. Finally, we discuss the insights gained from our preliminary baseline experiments based on both generative and discriminative SE methods with 12 curated metrics.
papers.justification: 该论文提出了URGENT挑战，统一去噪、去混响、带宽扩展和去削波等多个子任务，框架具有基础性和影响力，与语音增强和音频前端方向高度相关，且引用数较高，是必读级别的工作。

chinese_summary.problem: 现有语音增强研究覆盖的子任务有限，数据多样性和评估指标不足，缺乏统一的基准来评估模型的通用性、鲁棒性和泛化性。
chinese_summary.method: 提出URGENT挑战，构建一个统一框架将去噪、去混响、带宽扩展和削波恢复等子任务整合到单个模型中，并收集多样化公开数据构建评估集，基于生成式和判别式SE方法进行基线实验。
chinese_summary.innovation: 首次将多个SE子任务（去噪、去混响、带宽扩展、削波恢复）统一到一个挑战框架中，并构建了跨域多样化评估数据；通过12个精选指标全面评估模型性能，促进通用SE研究。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要中提及了初步基线实验，采用生成式和判别式方法以及12个指标，但未给出具体数值结果，证据为初步框架和实验设计。
chinese_summary.limitations: 挑战赛介绍性质，核心方法细节需阅读全文；基线性能未公开，无法评估方法实际效果；是否涵盖声学回声消除等子任务尚不明确。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 直接涉及语音增强核心子任务（去噪、去混响等），与研究方向的关键词高度匹配（speech enhancement, dereverberation），场景为通用SE模型评估，但论文侧重基准挑战而非新算法，需人工复核具体方法是否与前端处理相关。

papers.title: Sixty Years of Frequency-Domain Monaural Speech Enhancement: From Traditional to Deep Learning Methods
papers.summary: Frequency-domain monaural speech enhancement has been extensively studied for over 60 years, and a great number of methods have been proposed and applied to many devices. In the last decade, monaural speech enhancement has made tremendous progress with the advent and development of deep learning, and performance using such methods has been greatly improved relative to traditional methods. This survey paper first provides a comprehensive overview of traditional and deep-learning methods for monaural speech enhancement in the frequency domain. The fundamental assumptions of each approach are then summarized and analyzed to clarify their limitations and advantages. A comprehensive evaluation of some typical methods was conducted using the WSJ + Deep Noise Suppression (DNS) challenge and Voice Bank + DEMAND datasets to give an intuitive and unified comparison. The benefits of monaural speech enhancement methods using objective metrics relevant for normal-hearing and hearing-impaired listeners were evaluated. The objective test results showed that compression of the input features was important for simulated normal-hearing listeners but not for simulated hearing-impaired listeners. Potential future research and development topics in monaural speech enhancement are suggested.
papers.justification: 该综述系统梳理了频域单通道语音增强60年发展，涵盖传统与深度学习方法，与语音增强方向高度相关，具有重要参考价值和影响力，是必读级基础文献。

chinese_summary.problem: 系统综述60年来频域单通道语音增强的发展，包括传统方法和深度学习方法，总结各自假设、优缺点，并提供统一性能评估及未来方向。
chinese_summary.method: 这是一篇综述论文，通过系统性文献回顾，整理和分析传统方法（如谱减法、维纳滤波）与深度学习方法（如DNN、CNN、RNN）在频域单通道语音增强中的技术与假设；并在WSJ+DNS和Voice Bank+DEMAND数据集上对典型方法进行客观评测，使用针对正常听力和听障听者的指标。
chinese_summary.innovation: 提供全面且结构化的历史回顾，首次深入分析各方法的基本假设以揭示局限性和优势；在统一数据集上对比多种方法，并特别考察听障听者的客观指标，揭示输入特征压缩对不同听者群体的影响差异。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要明确使用WSJ+Deep Noise Suppression (DNS) challenge和Voice Bank+DEMAND数据集进行了典型方法的客观评测，指标针对正常和听障听者，并得出特征压缩对正常听者重要但对听障听者不重要的结论。
chinese_summary.limitations: 作为综述，未提出新算法；评估仅基于特定数据集和客观指标，缺乏主观听力实验验证；分类为Trends in Hearing，可能侧重听觉感知而非纯工程实现。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 论文主题（频域单通道语音增强）完全匹配研究方向中的speech enhancement、denoising、noise reduction等关键词；综述内容涵盖传统与深度学习，与音频前端处理中的neural masking、U-Net等方法直接相关；评估考虑听障听者，与音频前端在助听设备中的应用场景一致。

papers.title: Separate Anything You Describe
papers.summary: Language-queried audio source separation (LASS) is a new paradigm for computational auditory scene analysis (CASA). LASS aims to separate a target sound from an audio mixture given a natural language query, which provides a natural and scalable interface for digital audio applications. Recent works on LASS, despite attaining promising separation performance on specific sources (e.g., musical instruments, limited classes of audio events), are unable to separate audio concepts in the open domain. In this work, we introduce AudioSep, a foundation model for open-domain audio source separation with natural language queries. We train AudioSep on large-scale multimodal datasets and extensively evaluate its capabilities on numerous tasks including audio event separation, musical instrument separation, and speech enhancement. AudioSep demonstrates strong separation performance and impressive zero-shot generalization ability using audio captions or text labels as queries, substantially outperforming previous audio-queried and language-queried sound separation models. Specifically, AudioSep achieved strong results including a signal-to-distortion ratio improvement (SDRi) of 7.74 dB across 527 sound classes of the AudioSet; 9.14 dB on the VGGSound dataset; 8.22 dB on the AudioCaps dataset; 6.85 dB on the Clotho dataset; 10.51 dB on the MUSIC dataset; 10.04 dB on the ESC-50 dataset; 8.16 dB on the DCASE 2024 Task 9 dataset; and a segmental signal to noise ratio (SSNR) of 9.21 dB on the Voicebank-Demand dataset.
categories: IEEE Transactions on Audio, Speech, and Language Processing
papers.venue: IEEE Transactions on Audio, Speech, and Language Processing
papers.topic_name: Speech Separation and Target Speaker Extraction
papers.justification: 与语音分离和目标说话人提取方向高度相关，提出了语言查询的开放域音频源分离基础模型AudioSep，性能优异且具备零样本泛化能力，是领域内的重要基线工作。

chinese_summary.problem: 现有语言查询音频源分离方法仅能处理特定类别（如乐器、有限音频事件），无法在开放域中分离任意音频概念。
chinese_summary.method: 提出AudioSep基础模型，使用大规模多模态数据集训练，以自然语言查询作为输入，采用端到端架构实现开放域音频源分离。模型通过文本标签或音频描述作为查询，直接输出目标音频源。
chinese_summary.innovation: 1) 首次实现开放域音频源分离，支持任意自然语言查询；2) 在大规模多模态数据上训练，展现强大的零样本泛化能力；3) 在多个数据集上显著优于此前音频查询和语言查询的分离模型。
chinese_summary.evidence: 在AudioSet（527类）上SDRi 7.74 dB，VGGSound 9.14 dB，AudioCaps 8.22 dB，Clotho 6.85 dB，MUSIC 10.51 dB，ESC-50 10.04 dB，DCASE 2024 Task 9 8.16 dB，以及语音增强任务Voicebank-Demand上SSNR 9.21 dB。
chinese_summary.limitations: 论文主要聚焦于通用音频事件分离，语音增强仅为其中一项任务，未专门针对语音分离或目标说话人提取进行优化；可能对多说话人混合场景的分离效果未知。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 论文涉及源分离任务，包含语音增强任务，与研究方向中的'语音分离'和'源分离'关键词部分匹配，但核心是开放域音频事件分离而非专门的目标说话人提取。

papers.title: DELTA-TTS: Adapting Autoregressive Model into Diffusion Language Model for Text-to-Speech
papers.summary: Autoregressive (AR) text-to-speech (TTS) models generate discrete speech tokens sequentially, which makes inference slow and can degrade robustness by propagating local errors and hallucinations. This limitation stems from their left-to-right AR commitment: each token must be determined before future speech-token context is available. However, such ordering is not an inherent requirement for TTS, as the full input text is available before synthesis. In this paper, we introduce DELTA-TTS, a lightweight LoRA-based adaptation framework that converts a pretrained AR TTS model into a discrete diffusion language model (dLLM) for confidence-ordered speech-token decoding. To better capture the local structure of speech, DELTA-TTS incorporates a convolution module that injects local acoustic context, together with a $1/t$-weighted training objective and a time-shifted inference schedule that defer low-confidence positions to later steps. Trained on only $585$ hours of LibriTTS, DELTA-TTS achieves a $\textbf{1.75}\%$ WER on Seed-TTS test-en, outperforming its AR backbone while generating tokens $\textbf{3.3}\times$ faster. Further analysis shows that DELTA-TTS produces sharper text--speech alignment, increases overall decoding confidence, and mitigates hallucinations observed in AR generation.
papers.justification: 该论文直接针对语音合成（TTS）任务，提出将自回归模型转换为扩散语言模型，与研究方向中的Generative Speech Technology高度相关；方法新颖（LoRA适配、卷积模块、1/t加权训练），实验结果表明在质量和速度上均有提升，是必读级别的工作。

chinese_summary.problem: 现有自回归（AR）文本到语音（TTS）模型逐序列生成离散语音token，导致推理速度慢，且因局部误差传播和幻觉问题而鲁棒性下降。
chinese_summary.method: 提出DELTA-TTS框架，通过轻量级LoRA适配将预训练的AR TTS模型转换为离散扩散语言模型（dLLM），实现基于置信度排序的语音token解码。集成卷积模块以捕获局部声学上下文，采用1/t加权训练目标和时移推理调度，将低置信度位置推迟到后续步骤处理。
chinese_summary.innovation: 1. 首次将AR TTS模型转化为扩散语言模型，突破自左向右的生成顺序约束，允许按置信度解码。2. 利用LoRA实现高效适配，仅需微调少量参数即可转换预训练模型。3. 设计结合卷积模块、加权训练目标和时移推理的机制，提升解码置信度和对齐质量，减少幻觉。
chinese_summary.evidence: 在LibriTTS 585小时数据上训练，Seed-TTS test-en测试集词错误率1.75%，优于AR骨干模型；推理速度提升3.3倍。进一步分析显示对齐更尖锐、解码置信度更高、幻觉减少。
chinese_summary.limitations: 依赖预训练AR模型的质量和结构；训练数据量相对较小（585小时），可能限制泛化性；扩散模型推理步数未明确讨论，可能与速度-质量权衡有关。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 直接对应研究方向中的Text-to-Speech（TTS）和扩散模型在语音中的应用（diffusion model speech），方法创新且性能提升显著，可借鉴其模型适配思路用于其他生成式语音任务。

papers.title: Twenty-Five Years of Sensor Array and Multichannel Signal Processing: A review of progress to date and potential research directions
papers.summary: In this article, a general introduction to the area of sensor array and multichannel signal processing is provided, including associated activities of the IEEE Signal Processing Society (SPS) Sensor Array and Multichannel (SAM) Technical Committee (TC). The main technological advances in five SAM subareas made in the past 25 years are then presented in detail, including beamforming, direction-of-arrival (DOA) estimation, sensor location optimization, target/source localization based on sensor arrays, and multiple-input multiple-output (MIMO) arrays. Six recent developments are also provided at the end to indicate possible promising directions for future SAM research, which are graph signal processing (GSP) for sensor networks; tensor-based array signal processing, quaternion-valued array signal processing, 1-bit and noncoherent sensor array signal processing, machine learning and artificial intelligence (AI) for sensor arrays; and array signal processing for next-generation communication systems.
papers.justification: 全面回顾传感器阵列和波束形成领域25年进展，与麦克风阵列和波束形成方向高度相关，基础性强、影响力高，是必读综述。

chinese_summary.problem: 缺乏对传感器阵列和多通道信号处理领域过去25年主要技术进展和未来研究方向的系统综述，特别是波束形成、DOA估计、传感器位置优化、目标定位和MIMO阵列等子领域的总结。
chinese_summary.method: 采用综述方法，首先概述传感器阵列和多通道信号处理领域的基本概念及IEEE SPS SAM技术委员会的相关活动，然后详细回顾五个子领域（波束形成、DOA估计、传感器位置优化、基于传感器阵列的目标源定位、MIMO阵列）在过去25年的主要技术进展，最后提出六个未来研究方向（图信号处理、张量阵列处理、四元数阵列处理、1比特非相干阵列处理、机器学习/AI、下一代通信系统阵列处理）。
chinese_summary.innovation: 1. 提供首个涵盖过去25年SAM五个核心子领域进展的综合综述；2. 系统性地将六个新兴方向 (GSP、张量、四元数、1比特、AI、通信) 作为未来研究展望；3. 基于IEEE SPS SAM技术委员会的视角，确保内容权威性和时效性。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要中没有提供具体实验数据或系统证据，仅描述综述结构和历史回顾，属于综述性文章，证据来自文献总结。
chinese_summary.limitations: 1. 综述性质，缺乏实验对比或性能定量分析；2. 对每个子领域的介绍可能较为概括，深度有限；3. 未来方向的探讨偏重趋势，缺少具体算法设计。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 直接覆盖用户研究方向中的核心内容：beamforming、DOA estimation、array signal processing、spatial filtering、MIMO array等关键词，且综述性质有助于了解领域全貌和前沿方向，特别适合概念梳理和研究方向选择。

papers.title: Structured Nyquist Correlation Reconstruction for DOA Estimation With Sparse Arrays
papers.summary: Sparse arrays are known to achieve an increased number of degrees-of-freedom (DOFs) for direction-of-arrival (DOA) estimation, where an augmented virtual uniform array calculated from the correlations of sub-Nyquist spatial samples is processed to retrieve the angles unambiguously. Nevertheless, the geometry of the derived virtual array is dominated by the specific physical array configurations, as well as the deviation caused by the practical unforeseen circumstances such as detection malfunction and missing data, resulting in a quite sensitive model for virtual array signal processing. In this paper, we propose a novel sparse array DOA estimation algorithm via structured correlation reconstruction, where the Nyquist spatial filling is implemented on the physical array with a compressed transformation related to its equivalent filled array to guarantee the general applicability. While the unknown correlations located in the whole rows and columns of the augmented covariance matrix lead to the fact that strong incoherence property is no longer satisfied for matrix completion, the structural information is introduced as a priori to formulate the structured correlation reconstruction problem for matrix reconstruction. As such, the reconstructed covariance matrix can be effectively processed with full utilization of the achievable DOFs from the virtual array, but with a more flexible constraint on the array configuration. The described estimation problem is theoretically analyzed by deriving the corresponding Cramér-Rao bound (CRB). Moreover, we compare the derived CRB with the performance of the virtual array interpolation-based algorithm. Simulation results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed algorithm in terms of DOFs, resolution, and estimation accuracy.
papers.justification: 该论文针对稀疏阵列DOA估计提出结构化相关重构算法，与麦克风阵列及DOA估计方向高度相关，方法新颖且理论推导完整，属于经典赛道必读水平。

chinese_summary.problem: 解决稀疏阵列在DOA估计中因物理阵列配置和实际因素（如检测故障、缺失数据）导致虚拟协方差矩阵重构敏感、自由度利用不充分的问题。
chinese_summary.method: 提出结构化奈奎斯特相关重构算法：首先对物理阵列进行压缩变换实现奈奎斯特空间填充，然后利用协方差矩阵中整行整列未知相关的结构化先验信息，将矩阵重构问题建模为结构化相关重构，从而有效重建协方差矩阵，充分利用虚拟阵列自由度。
chinese_summary.innovation: 1. 通过压缩变换实现物理阵列的奈奎斯特空间填充，使算法对不同阵列配置具有通用性；2. 利用结构化先验信息（整行整列未知相关）解决矩阵补全中强非相干性不满足的问题，实现鲁棒的重建；3. 理论上推导了克拉美-罗界（CRB），并与虚拟阵列插值算法对比，验证了在自由度、分辨率和估计精度上的优势。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要中给出了理论推导的CRB，并通过与虚拟阵列插值算法的仿真比较，证明了所提算法在DOFs、分辨率和估计精度方面的有效性。
chinese_summary.limitations: 未讨论实际麦克风阵列中非理想因素（如噪声相关性、阵元互耦）的影响；仿真设置可能与实际麦克风阵列场景存在差距，需阅读全文确认具体实现细节和计算复杂度。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 论文直接研究稀疏阵列的DOA估计，与我的研究方向“麦克风阵列与波束形成”中的“声源定位”和“到达方向估计”高度吻合。文中使用的稀疏阵列、虚拟均匀阵列、协方差矩阵重构等技术直接适用于麦克风阵列场景，尤其对提升低阵列数情况下的DOA分辨能力有重要参考价值。

papers.title: Weakly Guided and Autoregressive Beamformer Parameterization for Generalizable Moving Speaker Extraction in Higher-Order Ambisonics
papers.summary: Linear spatial filters (beamformers) enable robust, generalizable and interpretable speech enhancement with performance guarantees under ideal parameterization. Modern beamformers are often parameterized by deep neural networks, whose performance degrades in dynamic scenarios with multiple moving speakers of unknown directions. We propose a data-driven beamforming pipeline, which only requires an estimate of the target's initial direction. Building on a higher-order ambisonics representation, we show that neural temporal-spectral processing can be decoupled from linear spatial processing, and thereby achieve generalizable and array-agnostic enhancement. By incorporating autoregression into a frame-wise causal framework, we maintain consistent performance throughout fast speaker motion and long recordings. Evaluation on synthetic data demonstrates robust enhancement under challenging conditions with closely spaced and crossing speakers. Real-world recordings in a dynamic office meeting scenario complement these findings and show generalizability across varying ambisonics orders.
papers.justification: 论文聚焦移动说话人提取中的波束形成问题，方法与我的麦克风阵列和波束形成方向高度相关，提出新颖的自回归参数化框架，实验充分，泛化性强。

chinese_summary.problem: 现有基于深度神经网络的波束形成器在多个未知方向移动说话人的动态场景下性能下降，需要一种鲁棒、可泛化且阵列无关的移动说话人提取方法。
chinese_summary.method: 提出一种数据驱动的波束形成流水线，仅需目标初始方向估计；基于高阶Ambisonics表示解耦神经时频处理与线性空间处理，并通过自回归帧级因果框架保持快速运动下的性能一致性，实现阵列无关的语音增强。
chinese_summary.innovation: 创新点包括：1）弱引导策略仅需初始方向，降低先验需求；2）自回归因果框架在帧级处理中保持对快速移动和长序列的稳定性能；3）基于高阶Ambisonics的解耦设计使方法可泛化至不同阵列配置和Ambisonics阶数。
chinese_summary.evidence: 合成数据实验在紧密间隔和交叉说话人挑战条件下显示鲁棒增强；真实动态办公室会议场景中验证了跨不同Ambisonics阶数的泛化性。
chinese_summary.limitations: 摘要未提及噪声类型及信噪比范围、未与现有移动说话人提取方法（如时域方法）定量对比、未讨论初始方向估计误差的影响。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 论文核心为波束形成（beamforming）和空间滤波（spatial filtering）在移动多说话人场景下的多通道语音增强（multichannel speech enhancement），直接命中研究方向关键词beamforming、array signal processing、spatial filtering、MVDR beamforming、sound source localization（通过初始方向估计），且使用高阶Ambisonics表示与空间特征相关。

papers.title: Ranking the Impact of Contextual Specialization in Neural Speech Enhancement
papers.summary: We systematically investigate neural speech enhancement systems, ranging from very small ($\sim$10\,k parameters) to medium-large ($\sim$2-5\,M parameters), which specialize to acoustic conditions using contextual information such as speaker identity, noise type, speaker gender, spoken language, and SNR. By fine-tuning generalist models on specific data subsets, we find that specializing to a speaker's identity consistently yields the largest gains in estimated speech intelligibility and quality. In contrast, specializing to SNR, noise type, or gender offers only marginal benefits. Crucially, we show that a small model specialized to both a specific speaker and a specific noise type can match or exceed the performance of a generalist model ten times its size. Further, cross-lingual tests reveal that models specialized to a target language outperform multilingual generalists, suggesting that language is a salient feature for specialization. These findings highlight the potential of small, adaptive models for resource-constrained applications like hearing aids, which specialize on-the-fly to contextual information.
papers.justification: 该论文系统评估了不同上下文信息对语音增强系统性能的影响，发现说话人身份特化效果最显著，与Speech Enhancement and Audio Frontend方向高度相关，实验扎实，具有应用价值。

chinese_summary.problem: 在资源受限的语音增强系统中（如助听器），确定哪些上下文信息（说话人身份、噪声类型、性别、语言、SNR）的专门化能带来最大的性能提升，以指导小模型自适应。
chinese_summary.method: 通过微调通用语音增强模型（基于特定数据子集），系统比较不同上下文专门化（说话人身份、噪声类型、性别、语言、SNR）对估计的语音可懂度和质量的影响；包含从极小（约10k参数）到中大型（2-5M参数）模型的对比实验。
chinese_summary.innovation: 1) 首次系统评估多种上下文专门化对神经语音增强的相对贡献，并量化其影响排名；2) 发现说话人身份专门化始终带来最大增益，而SNR、噪声类型或性别专门化收益甚微；3) 证明专用于特定说话人和噪声类型的模型（即使参数少十倍）可匹配或超越通用模型；4) 揭示语言专门化优于多语言通用模型。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要中明确报告：说话人身份专门化在语音可懂度和质量上增益最大；小模型（专门化）可匹敌十倍参数通用模型；跨语言测试显示目标语言专门化优于多语言通用模型。但未提供具体数值或统计显著性，需阅读全文确认。
chinese_summary.limitations: 1) 模型结构仅限特定神经语音增强系统，未涵盖所有架构（如U-Net变体）；2) 实验基于有限数据集和上下文组合，泛化性需验证；3) 未涉及实际实时自适应系统实现细节。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 论文直接研究语音增强系统性能，与研究方向中的speech enhancement核心主题一致；专门化策略与资源受限场景（如助听器）匹配，关键词如speech enhancement、noise suppression、speech frontend均命中。

papers.title: Unified Audio Intelligence Without Regressing on Text Intelligence
papers.summary: Audio intelligence involves understanding, reasoning about, and generating both audio and speech. In this work, we introduce Nemotron-Labs-Audex-30B-A3B (Audex), a unified audio-text LLM built on Nemotron-Cascade-2-30B-A3B, a strong text-only MoE LLM. Audex adopts a simple unified design with a single Transformer decoder: audio inputs are encoded and projected into the text embedding space, while text tokens and quantized audio output tokens are treated uniformly during generation. This architecture enables strong audio-text fusion, seamless multimodal generation, and compatibility with standard LLM training and inference infrastructure. For training, we meticulously curate audio-text datasets comprising 157.4B audio tokens and 320.5B text tokens. We apply multi-stage supervised training on these datasets, followed by text-only Cascade RL and multi-domain on-policy distillation. Audex delivers state-of-the-art audio understanding, speech recognition and translation, text-to-speech, audio generation, and speech-to-speech generation, while preserving very compelling reasoning, alignment, knowledge, long-context, and agentic capabilities of its text-only LLM backbone with marginal or no regression. We release the model checkpoints to facilitate open research.
papers.justification: 论文提出统一音频文本大模型Audex，基于MoE架构实现语音理解、合成、翻译与生成，在生成式语音技术方向高度相关，工作质量与新颖性突出，为必读级成果。

chinese_summary.problem: 论文旨在构建一个统一的音频-文本大语言模型，在集成音频理解、识别、翻译、TTS和音频生成等多种任务的同时，避免其文本LLM基座的能力退化。
chinese_summary.method: 核心方法：基于预训练文本MoE LLM（Nemotron-Cascade）设计单一Transformer解码器架构；音频输入经编码后投影到文本嵌入空间，文本token与量化音频输出token在生成过程中统一处理。训练流程包括多阶段监督训练（利用157.4B音频token和320.5B文本token），随后进行纯文本强化学习与多领域在线蒸馏以保持文本智能。
chinese_summary.innovation: 创新点：1) 采用统一的token化与解码框架，将音频和文本无缝融合，简化多模态生成流程；2) 通过精心策划的多模态数据和分阶段训练，在取得SOTA音频理解和生成性能的同时，完整保留文本LLM的推理、对齐、知识、长上下文等高级能力，未见回归；3) 支持语音到语音的直接生成通道，扩展了语音交互范式。
chinese_summary.evidence: 证据不足：摘要仅声称在音频理解、语音识别/翻译、TTS、音频生成和语音到语音生成等任务上达到SOTA，但未提供任何量化指标、基准测试或对比数据；仅提及模型发布以促进开放研究，具体性能需阅读全文核实。
chinese_summary.limitations: 可能局限：未披露模型规模细节（仅提及MoE），生成音频的质量指标、是否支持可控语音生成（如情感、风格）未知；训练资源和推理效率未说明；对生成式语音增强、修复等任务未涉及，与扩散模型、流匹配等生成范式的关联有待确认。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 论文直接涉及text-to-speech和音频生成，匹配您研究方向中的speech synthesis和TTS；但其生成机制未知（可能是自回归），与生成式语音增强、修复、扩散模型/流匹配等核心方向关联度低，属于泛泛相关，建议人工复核全文以判断是否提供新的生成范式或神经声码器设计。

papers.title: Flow Matching-Based Speech Source Separation with Best-of-N Biometric Sampling
papers.summary: Single-channel speech separation remains challenging for real-world deployment due to source permutation ambiguity, sampling variability of generative models, and the difficulty of processing long recordings with chunk-wise inference. We address these issues with a conditional flow-matching-based method that produces an ordered two-source output conditioned on the mixture. A frozen speaker encoder defines the source order during training and is reused at inference for biometric best-of-$N$ candidate selection and chunk-level channel alignment. We evaluate separation quality on Libri2Mix benchmark using SI-SDR, PESQ, and ESTOI, and measure downstream impact using cpWER for automatic speech recognition and EER for speaker verification. The results show that the proposed Transformer U-Net variant is competitive with strong baselines in objective separation metrics and achieves the lowest downstream automatic speech recognition and speaker verification error rates in all evaluated settings.
papers.topic_name: Speech Separation and Target Speaker Extraction
papers.justification: 提出基于条件流匹配的语音分离方法，利用生物特征采样和最佳N选择解决排列模糊与块处理问题，在分离质量及下游ASR、说话人验证上表现优异，高度相关语音分离与生成式语音技术方向。

chinese_summary.problem: 单通道语音分离中源置换模糊、生成模型采样不确定性以及长录音分块推理导致的通道错位问题。
chinese_summary.method: 提出基于条件流匹配的分离方法，输出有序双源结果并以混合信号为条件；训练时利用冻结的说话人编码器固定源顺序，推理时通过生物特征最佳N候选选择和块级通道对齐来提升一致性。
chinese_summary.innovation: 将流匹配生成模型引入语音分离，通过说话人编码器定义源顺序以消除置换模糊；提出基于生物特征的最佳N采样策略，结合块级对齐解决长录音的连续性问题。
chinese_summary.evidence: 在Libri2Mix数据集上评估SI-SDR、PESQ、ESTOI客观指标，以及下游ASR的cpWER和说话人验证的EER；结果表明Transformer U-Net变体在客观指标上与强基线相当，并在所有下游任务中获得最低错误率。
chinese_summary.limitations: 摘要仅提及双源分离，未验证更多说话人场景；流匹配模型的推理效率与实时性未说明；块级对齐策略的细节及对极长录音的稳健性有待确认。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 论文属于语音分离范畴，匹配关键词‘speech separation’和‘source separation’；处理置换模糊和长录音推理的瓶颈与双路径网络、盲源分离等研究方向有交集；但方法基于生成式流匹配，非本方向主流的掩蔽或时域分离技术，且无明确的目标说话人提取设定，相关性较低，需人工复核是否借鉴其排序或块对齐策略。

papers.title: Fréchet Distance Loss on Speech Representations for Text-to-Speech Synthesis
papers.summary: Few-step diffusion and flow-matching text-to-speech (TTS) models are usually trained with local objectives, such as conditional flow matching, reconstruction, and stop prediction. These losses provide stable optimization, but they never ask whether sampled speech follows the distribution of high-quality speech. We propose Speech Representation Fr'echet Distance loss (SR-FD), a training-time distributional regularizer for tokenizer-free flow-matching autoregressive TTS. During fine-tuning, the model synthesizes speech with the same few-step sampler used at deployment, and SR-FD matches the mean and covariance of frozen Whisper and CTC features of this speech to reference statistics computed offline from three complementary content targets. The loss requires no discriminator and no inference-time computation. On Seed-TTS English, four-step SR-FD fine-tuning reduces WER from the original four-step VoxCPM2 baseline's 2.2279% to 1.4147%, a 36.5% relative reduction, and also surpasses the original ten-step baseline at 1.7366%; both gains are significant under an utterance-level paired bootstrap. Speaker similarity and objective quality proxies are preserved at the ten-step level, and an error analysis shows the gain comes from content substitutions across all prompt lengths. SR-FD is thus an intelligibility-improving distributional regularizer for few-step TTS.
papers.justification: 论文提出基于语音表征的Fréchet距离损失，显著提升少步流匹配TTS的可懂度，与生成式语音合成方向高度相关，方法新颖且效果扎实。

chinese_summary.problem: 少步扩散和流匹配TTS模型通常仅用局部损失训练，缺乏对生成语音整体分布是否接近高质量语音的考量，导致合成语音的可懂度不足。
chinese_summary.method: 提出Speech Representation Fréchet Distance loss (SR-FD)，一种训练时分布正则化器。在微调阶段，用部署时的少步采样器生成语音，提取冻结的Whisper和CTC特征，计算其与离线获得的参考特征分布（基于三种内容目标）之间的Fréchet距离，即均值和协方差的差异，作为额外损失项加入训练。
chinese_summary.innovation: 首次将Fréchet距离引入语音表征空间，作为TTS的分布正则化损失，不同于传统局部损失或判别器方法；该损失无需推理时额外计算且不依赖判别器，仅通过微调即可显著提升少步生成的可懂度。
chinese_summary.evidence: 在Seed-TTS英文数据集上，对VoxCPM2基线四步微调，WER从2.2279%降至1.4147%（相对降低36.5%），并优于原十步基线的1.7366%，差异在话语级别配对bootstrap检验下显著；说话人相似度和质量代理指标保持在十步水平；错误分析表明提升来自不同提示长度下的内容替换减少。
chinese_summary.limitations: 仅在单一模型（VoxCPM2）和英文数据上验证；依赖特定的冻结特征提取器（Whisper和CTC）；对其他模型结构、多语言或更少步数的泛化性需阅读全文确认。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 论文直接针对TTS生成式模型，结合流匹配和分布匹配技术，属于生成式语音合成核心方向，与研究方向中的speech synthesis、text-to-speech、generative model speech等关键词高度匹配。

papers.title: Neural Target Speech Extraction: An overview
papers.summary: Humans can listen to a target speaker even in challenging acoustic conditions that have noise, reverberation, and interfering speakers. This phenomenon is known as the cocktail party effect. For decades, researchers have focused on approaching the listening ability of humans. One critical issue is handling interfering speakers because the target and nontarget speech signals share similar characteristics, complicating their discrimination. Target speech/speaker extraction (TSE) isolates the speech signal of a target speaker from a mixture of several speakers, with or without noises and reverberations, using clues that identify the speaker in the mixture. Such clues might be a spatial clue indicating the direction of the target speaker, a video of the speaker’s lips, and a prerecorded enrollment utterance from which the speaker’s voice characteristics can be derived. TSE is an emerging field of research that has received increased attention in recent years because it offers a practical approach to the cocktail party problem and involves such aspects of signal processing as audio, visual, and array processing as well as deep learning. This article focuses on recent neural-based approaches and presents an in-depth overview of TSE. We guide readers through the different major approaches, emphasizing the similarities among frameworks and discussing potential future directions.
papers.topic_name: Speech Separation and Target Speaker Extraction
papers.justification: 神经目标语音提取综述，系统梳理基于空间、视觉和注册语音的多种方法框架，高度契合语音分离与目标说话人提取方向，引用高，为领域必读基础文献。

chinese_summary.problem: 全面综述神经目标说话人提取（TSE）的关键方法、框架和未来趋势，解决如何利用辅助线索（如空间、视觉、声纹）从多说话人混合信号中提取目标语音的问题。
chinese_summary.method: 本文为综述方法，系统分类和总结基于深度学习的TSE技术，涵盖音频、视觉和阵列处理等跨领域线索，并强调不同框架（如掩码网络、端到端模型）间的关联。
chinese_summary.innovation: 首次对神经网络TSE领域进行深入概述，不局限于单一模态，横向对比多种线索与架构的共性；指出TSE作为解决鸡尾酒会问题的实用途径，并明确给出未来潜在研究方向。
chinese_summary.evidence: 证据不足：本文为综述，摘要未提供任何实验数据或量化结果，仅概括领域进展。
chinese_summary.limitations: 可能局限于截至2019-2020年的方法（需查看全文确认是否涵盖最新Transformer或自监督模型）；作为综述，缺乏原创方法贡献，深度依赖于讨论的正交性。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 直接匹配我的‘目标说话人提取’研究方向，覆盖神经方法、线索利用、框架对比等核心关注点，且涉及鸡尾酒会效应和盲源分离背景，有助于梳理领域全貌。

papers.title: MossFormer: Pushing the Performance Limit of Monaural Speech Separation Using Gated Single-Head Transformer with Convolution-Augmented Joint Self-Attentions
papers.summary: Transformer based models have provided significant performance improvements in monaural speech separation. However, there is still a performance gap compared to a recent proposed upper bound. The major limitation of the current dual-path Transformer models is the inefficient modelling of long-range elemental interactions and local feature patterns. In this work, we achieve the upper bound by proposing a gated single-head transformer architecture with convolution-augmented joint self-attentions, named MossFormer (Monaural speech separation TransFormer). To effectively solve the indirect elemental interactions across chunks in the dual-path architecture, MossFormer employs a joint local and global self-attention architecture that simultaneously performs a full-computation self-attention on local chunks and a linearised low-cost self-attention over the full sequence. The joint attention enables MossFormer model full-sequence elemental interaction directly. In addition, we employ a powerful attentive gating mechanism with simplified single-head self-attentions. Besides the attentive long-range modelling, we also augment MossFormer with convolutions for the position-wise local pattern modelling. As a consequence, MossFormer significantly outperforms the previous models and achieves the state-of-the-art results on WSJ0-2/3mix and WHAM!/WHAMR! benchmarks. Our model achieves the SI-SDRi upper bound of 21.2 dB on WSJ0-3mix and only 0.3 dB below the upper bound of 23.1 dB on WSJ0-2mix.
categories: IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing
papers.venue: IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing
papers.topic_name: Speech Separation and Target Speaker Extraction
papers.justification: 提出了联合局部和全局自注意力的门控单头Transformer架构，在多个单声道语音分离基准上达到领先性能，是语音分离方向的近年重要代表性工作。

chinese_summary.problem: 如何在单声道语音分离中克服双路径Transformer模型对长程元素交互和局部特征模式建模效率低的问题，从而逼近理论上限。
chinese_summary.method: 提出MossFormer，采用门控单头Transformer架构，结合卷积增强的联合自注意力。通过联合局部和全局自注意力，同时对局部块进行全计算自注意力和对全序列进行线性化低成本自注意力，实现直接的全序列元素交互；并使用注意力门控机制与简化的单头自注意力，以及卷积增强位置局部模式建模。
chinese_summary.innovation: 1) 提出联合局部和全局自注意力，同时计算局部全注意力和全序列线性注意力，使模型能直接进行全序列元素交互，克服双路径架构的间接交互限制；2) 采用门控单头自注意力机制，简化多头注意力并提升建模能力；3) 结合卷积增强局部模式建模，提升模型对位置局部特征的捕获能力。
chinese_summary.evidence: 在WSJ0-2mix和WSJ0-3mix以及WHAM!/WHAMR!基准上达到最先进水平；在WSJ0-3mix上取得SI-SDRi上限21.2 dB，在WSJ0-2mix上仅低于上限0.3 dB。
chinese_summary.limitations: 摘要未提及计算复杂度、实时性等局限；仅在标准数据集验证，泛化能力未知；性能接近上限但在WSJ0-2mix上仍有0.3 dB差距，能否进一步缩小需确认。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 论文专注于单声道语音分离，属于语音分离核心研究；采用时域Transformer架构与掩蔽估计，匹配关键词‘speech separation’、‘dual-path network’等；提出的联合自注意力机制直接改进双路径网络，与研究方向高度一致。

papers.title: Voicebox: Text-Guided Multilingual Universal Speech Generation at Scale
papers.summary: Large-scale generative models such as GPT and DALL-E have revolutionized the research community. These models not only generate high fidelity outputs, but are also generalists which can solve tasks not explicitly taught. In contrast, speech generative models are still primitive in terms of scale and task generalization. In this paper, we present Voicebox, the most versatile text-guided generative model for speech at scale. Voicebox is a non-autoregressive flow-matching model trained to infill speech, given audio context and text, trained on over 50K hours of speech that are not filtered or enhanced. Similar to GPT, Voicebox can perform many different tasks through in-context learning, but is more flexible as it can also condition on future context. Voicebox can be used for mono or cross-lingual zero-shot text-to-speech synthesis, noise removal, content editing, style conversion, and diverse sample generation. In particular, Voicebox outperforms the state-of-the-art zero-shot TTS model VALL-E on both intelligibility (5.9% vs 1.9% word error rates) and audio similarity (0.580 vs 0.681) while being up to 20 times faster. Audio samples can be found in \url{https://voicebox.metademolab.com}.
papers.justification: 提出Voicebox，基于流匹配的非自回归语音生成模型，实现文本引导的多任务语音生成（含零样本TTS、降噪等），是生成式语音技术方向的重要基础工作，引用高，必读。

chinese_summary.problem: 构建一个大规模、文本引导的通用语音生成模型，能够在多种语音任务上通过上下文学习实现零样本泛化，解决现有语音生成模型在规模和任务灵活性上的局限。
chinese_summary.method: 提出Voicebox，一个基于流匹配的非自回归生成模型。它通过在超过5万小时未增强语音上训练语音填充任务（给定音频上下文和文本预测缺失片段），使模型学会利用过去与未来上下文，实现文本引导的语音生成。推理时无需微调，即可通过上下文学习执行单/跨语言零样本文本到语音合成、降噪、内容编辑、风格转换等任务。
chinese_summary.innovation: 首次将流匹配与大规模语音填充训练结合，赋予非自回归模型上下文学习能力，可同时条件于过去与未来音频上下文，而GPT式自回归模型仅能利用过去；模型在零样本多语言TTS上显著优于VALL-E，同时生成速度快20倍，展示了流匹配在通用语音生成中的高效性与可扩展性。
chinese_summary.evidence: 在零样本TTS任务上，Voicebox的词错误率（WER）为1.9%，优于VALL-E的5.9%；音频相似度得分0.681，优于VALL-E的0.580，且推理快20倍。模型基于50K小时非净化语音训练，演示了噪声去除、内容编辑等任务。音频样例发布于项目页面。
chinese_summary.limitations: 摘要未报告语音增强（如降噪）的客观指标，仅提及功能；流匹配的非自回归生成质量依赖于掩码采样策略，可能产生不连贯片段；训练数据规模大，资源需求高。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 研究方向聚焦生成式语音技术，尤其涉及流匹配、扩散模型等生成方法。Voicebox直接应用流匹配于语音生成，覆盖语音合成、降噪、风格转换，且强调零样本泛化，与我方的'flow matching speech'、'speech generation'、'speech synthesis'等关键词高度吻合。

papers.title: Neural Codec Language Models are Zero-Shot Text to Speech Synthesizers
papers.summary: We introduce a language modeling approach for text to speech synthesis (TTS). Specifically, we train a neural codec language model (called VALL-E) using discrete codes derived from an off-the-shelf neural audio codec model, and regard TTS as a conditional language modeling task rather than continuous signal regression as in previous work. During the pre-training stage, we scale up the TTS training data to 50 k hours of English speech which is hundreds of times larger than existing systems. VALL-E emerges in-context learning capability and can be used to synthesize high-quality personalized speech with only a 3-second enrolled recording of an unseen speaker as a prompt. Experiment results show that VALL-E significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art zero-shot TTS system in terms of speech naturalness and speaker similarity. In addition, we find VALL-E could preserve the speaker's emotion and acoustic environment from the prompt in synthesis.
categories: IEEE Transactions on Audio, Speech, and Language Processing
papers.venue: IEEE Transactions on Audio, Speech, and Language Processing
papers.justification: 提出VALL-E，首次将TTS转化为基于神经编解码语言模型的条件生成任务，实现仅需3秒语音提示的零样本声音克隆，是生成式语音技术方向的里程碑式工作，引用超1200，必读基础文献。

chinese_summary.problem: 实现零样本文本到语音合成，通过语言建模方法将连续信号回归转化为离散代码生成，仅需极短提示即可克隆未见说话人音色并保持情感与声学环境。
chinese_summary.method: 基于现成神经音频编解码器提取离散音频代码，将TTS视为条件语言建模任务，训练语言模型VALL-E自回归预测音频代码序列，再经编解码器重构波形；预训练使用5万小时英语语音，推理时以3秒目标说话人录音作为提示进行零样本合成。
chinese_summary.innovation: 首次将语言模型范式引入TTS，从连续信号回归转向离散代码的条件生成；利用大规模数据（5万小时）与情境学习能力，突破性地以极短音频提示实现高质量个性化语音合成，且能迁移提示中的情感和环境特性。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要声明实验在语音自然度和说话人相似度上显著超越现有零样本TTS系统，并具备情感与声学环境保持能力，但无具体数值或统计检验。
chinese_summary.limitations: 摘要未提及局限性；需阅读全文确认对极短或嘈杂提示、跨语言、不同录音条件下泛化性，模型规模与推理效率，以及训练细节。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 论文属于语音合成（TTS）范畴，与研究方向中的“speech synthesis”“text-to-speech”关键词部分匹配，但未涉及生成增强、修复、扩散模型或流匹配等核心关注点，且基于语言模型而非生成式声学模型，相关性较低，建议人工复核是否需要关注。

papers.title: Moshi: a speech-text foundation model for real-time dialogue
papers.summary: We introduce Moshi, a speech-text foundation model and full-duplex spoken dialogue framework. Current systems for spoken dialogue rely on pipelines of independent components, namely voice activity detection, speech recognition, textual dialogue and text-to-speech. Such frameworks cannot emulate the experience of real conversations. First, their complexity induces a latency of several seconds between interactions. Second, text being the intermediate modality for dialogue, non-linguistic information that modifies meaning -- such as emotion or non-speech sounds -- is lost in the interaction. Finally, they rely on a segmentation into speaker turns, which does not take into account overlapping speech, interruptions and interjections. Moshi solves these independent issues altogether by casting spoken dialogue as speech-to-speech generation. Starting from a text language model backbone, Moshi generates speech as tokens from the residual quantizer of a neural audio codec, while modeling separately its own speech and that of the user into parallel streams. This allows for the removal of explicit speaker turns, and the modeling of arbitrary conversational dynamics. We moreover extend the hierarchical semantic-to-acoustic token generation of previous work to first predict time-aligned text tokens as a prefix to audio tokens. Not only this"Inner Monologue"method significantly improves the linguistic quality of generated speech, but we also illustrate how it can provide streaming speech recognition and text-to-speech. Our resulting model is the first real-time full-duplex spoken large language model, with a theoretical latency of 160ms, 200ms in practice, and is available at https://github.com/kyutai-labs/moshi.
papers.justification: 首个实时全双工语音大语言模型，将口语对话建模为语音到语音生成，通过神经音频编解码器Token化和Inner Monologue方法提升生成质量，是生成式语音技术领域的里程碑工作，与研究方向高度相关且必读。

chinese_summary.problem: 现有口语对话系统依赖串行流水线（语音活动检测、语音识别、文本对话、文本转语音），导致高延迟（数秒）、丢失副语言信息、无法处理重叠语音和打断。
chinese_summary.method: 将口语对话建模为语音到语音的生成任务：基于文本语言模型骨干，使用神经音频编解码器的残差量化生成语音令牌，将自身和用户语音建模为并行流以去除说话人轮次；提出 Inner Monologue 方法，先生成时间对齐的文本令牌作为音频令牌的前缀，提升语言质量并实现流式语音识别和文本转语音。
chinese_summary.innovation: 首次将全双工口语对话完全转化为语音到语音生成，消除流水线依赖；通过并行流建模实现任意对话动态，不再需要显式说话人轮次；Inner Monologue 方法统一了语音识别和合成的内部表示，同时提升了生成语音的语言质量。
chinese_summary.evidence: 理论延迟 160ms，实际 200ms，代码开源（https://github.com/kyutai-labs/moshi）。声称显著改善语言质量，但无定量指标或对比基线。
chinese_summary.limitations: 摘要未提供评估指标（如 WER、MOS、对话质量评分），未说明训练数据、语言支持范围或与传统级联系统的定量比较；生成式语音增强或修复等能力未提及。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 命中关键词 'speech generation' 和 'text-to-speech'，涉及神经音频编解码器与语音合成/生成技术，与我的研究方向部分重叠。但核心贡献在对话系统架构，而非生成式模型方法（如扩散、流匹配）本身的创新，且未涉及语音增强或修复，相关性较弱，建议人工复核以确认是否涵盖值得关注的生成技术细节。

papers.title: CLAP Learning Audio Concepts from Natural Language Supervision
papers.summary: Mainstream machine listening models are trained to learn audio concepts under the paradigm of one class label to many recordings focusing on one task. Learning under such restricted supervision limits the flexibility of models because they require labeled audio for training and can only predict the predefined categories. Instead, we propose to learn audio concepts from natural language supervision. We call our approach Contrastive Language-Audio Pretraining (CLAP), which connects language and audio by using two encoders and a contrastive learning objective, bringing audio and text descriptions into a joint multimodal space. We trained CLAP with 128k audio and text pairs and evaluated it on 16 downstream tasks across 7 domains, such as classification of sound events, scenes, music, and speech. CLAP establishes state-of-the-art (SoTA) in Zero-Shot performance. Also, we evaluated CLAP’s audio encoder in a supervised learning setup and achieved SoTA in 5 tasks. The Zero-Shot capability removes the need of training with class labeled audio, enables flexible class prediction at inference time, and generalizes well in multiple downstream tasks. Code is available at: https://github.com/microsoft/CLAP.
categories: IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing
papers.venue: IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing
papers.justification: 提出对比语言-音频预训练(CLAP)，实现跨模态零样本学习，显著推动音频表示学习和音乐信息检索，成为必读基础工作。

chinese_summary.problem: 传统音频分类模型依赖预定义类别标签，灵活性差且需要大量标注数据，难以泛化到未知类别。论文旨在通过自然语言监督学习音频概念，实现无需类标签训练的零样本音频分类。
chinese_summary.method: 提出对比语言-音频预训练（CLAP）方法，使用双塔结构：一个音频编码器和一个文本编码器，通过对比学习目标将音频与文本描述映射到联合多模态空间。训练使用128k音频-文本对，推理时直接计算测试音频与候选类别文本的相似度进行零样本分类。
chinese_summary.innovation: 将对比语言-图像预训练范式成功迁移至音频领域，首次实现大规模音频-文本联合学习；在7个领域共16个下游分类任务上取得零样本SOTA，打破了传统依赖类标签的局限；预训练音频编码器在监督微调后也展现出强大性能，在5项任务上达到SOTA。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要中声明在16个下游任务上零样本性能达到SOTA，监督学习设置下音频编码器在5个任务上取得SOTA，代码已开源。但未提供具体指标数值。
chinese_summary.limitations: 未涉及生成式语音任务，仅聚焦分类；训练数据规模仅128k，可能限制复杂语音场景的泛化；未讨论模型复杂度、推理速度或对文本描述质量的敏感性；在语音增强、合成等生成任务上的适用性完全未知。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 论文提出的音频-文本联合表示学习方法可作为通用音频基础模型，理论上其音频理解能力可能用于指导语音生成任务（如TTS的内容一致性、语音增强的语义保真度），但摘要未提供任何与生成相关的证据，匹配度低，需人工复核潜在迁移可能性。

papers.title: Seed-TTS: A Family of High-Quality Versatile Speech Generation Models
papers.summary: We introduce Seed-TTS, a family of large-scale autoregressive text-to-speech (TTS) models capable of generating speech that is virtually indistinguishable from human speech. Seed-TTS serves as a foundation model for speech generation and excels in speech in-context learning, achieving performance in speaker similarity and naturalness that matches ground truth human speech in both objective and subjective evaluations. With fine-tuning, we achieve even higher subjective scores across these metrics. Seed-TTS offers superior controllability over various speech attributes such as emotion and is capable of generating highly expressive and diverse speech for speakers in the wild. Furthermore, we propose a self-distillation method for speech factorization, as well as a reinforcement learning approach to enhance model robustness, speaker similarity, and controllability. We additionally present a non-autoregressive (NAR) variant of the Seed-TTS model, named $\text{Seed-TTS}_\text{DiT}$, which utilizes a fully diffusion-based architecture. Unlike previous NAR-based TTS systems, $\text{Seed-TTS}_\text{DiT}$ does not depend on pre-estimated phoneme durations and performs speech generation through end-to-end processing. We demonstrate that this variant achieves comparable performance to the language model-based variant and showcase its effectiveness in speech editing. We encourage readers to listen to demos at \url{https://bytedancespeech.github.io/seedtts_tech_report}.
papers.justification: 高度契合生成语音技术方向，提出大规模自回归TTS基础模型与扩散变体，具备上下文学习、高质量与控制能力，是近年语音合成领域的里程碑式工作，必读级别。

chinese_summary.problem: 开发能够生成接近真人水平、具有高度可控性和多样性的语音合成基础模型，并拓展至语音编辑等任务。
chinese_summary.method: 提出Seed-TTS模型族，包含大规模自回归TTS与基于全扩散的非自回归变体Seed-TTS_DiT；通过自蒸馏实现语音因子分解，并采用强化学习提升模型鲁棒性、说话人相似度和可控性。Seed-TTS_DiT无需预估计音素时长，实现端到端的语音生成与编辑。
chinese_summary.innovation: 1) 在自回归TTS中引入语音上下文学习，客观与主观评估均显示说话人相似度和自然度匹配真人语音；2) 提出完全基于扩散的非自回归TTS架构Seed-TTS_DiT，不依赖时长模型，性能与语言模型变体相当，并能有效用于语音编辑；3) 结合自蒸馏与强化学习技术，进一步增强模型对情感等属性的控制能力。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要中声明在客观和主观评估中，种子TTS在说话人相似度和自然度上与真人语音无显著差异；微调后主观得分更高；展示了Seed-TTS_DiT在语音编辑中的有效性，并提供了演示链接。但未给出具体指标数值。
chinese_summary.limitations: 摘要未提及模型规模、推理速度、计算成本等实际部署问题；未说明对不同语言、口音或噪声环境下的泛化能力；语音编辑的具体实现与边界未展开。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 研究方向聚焦生成语音技术，特别是TTS和扩散模型在语音中的应用。本论文既是高质量TTS模型，又提出扩散驱动的非自回归变体，直接匹配关键词text-to-speech、speech generation、diffusion model speech，且涉及可控生成和语音编辑，与研究兴趣高度重合。

papers.title: MERT: Acoustic Music Understanding Model with Large-Scale Self-supervised Training
papers.summary: Self-supervised learning (SSL) has recently emerged as a promising paradigm for training generalisable models on large-scale data in the fields of vision, text, and speech. Although SSL has been proven effective in speech and audio, its application to music audio has yet to be thoroughly explored. This is partially due to the distinctive challenges associated with modelling musical knowledge, particularly tonal and pitched characteristics of music. To address this research gap, we propose an acoustic Music undERstanding model with large-scale self-supervised Training (MERT), which incorporates teacher models to provide pseudo labels in the masked language modelling (MLM) style acoustic pre-training. In our exploration, we identified an effective combination of teacher models, which outperforms conventional speech and audio approaches in terms of performance. This combination includes an acoustic teacher based on Residual Vector Quantisation - Variational AutoEncoder (RVQ-VAE) and a musical teacher based on the Constant-Q Transform (CQT). Furthermore, we explore a wide range of settings to overcome the instability in acoustic language model pre-training, which allows our designed paradigm to scale from 95M to 330M parameters. Experimental results indicate that our model can generalise and perform well on 14 music understanding tasks and attain state-of-the-art (SOTA) overall scores.
papers.justification: 提出大规模自监督音乐理解模型MERT，融合声学教师RVQ-VAE和音乐教师CQT，在14个音乐理解任务上取得SOTA，成为音乐信息检索的重要基线，完全匹配研究方向。

chinese_summary.problem: 探索自监督学习在音乐音频中的应用，解决音乐知识建模中音调和音高特性的独特挑战。
chinese_summary.method: 提出MERT模型，采用掩码语言建模风格的声学预训练，结合两种教师模型提供伪标签：基于RVQ-VAE的声学教师和基于CQT的音乐教师；通过优化训练稳定性，将模型规模扩展至3.3亿参数。
chinese_summary.innovation: 首次将声学与音乐双教师模型引入音乐自监督预训练，有效捕获音乐的音调和音高信息；解决了音乐预训练中的不稳定性问题，实现从9500万到3.3亿参数的扩展；在14项音乐理解任务上达到最先进水平。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要提及模型在14个音乐理解任务上取得SOTA总体分数，具体实验证据需查阅全文。
chinese_summary.limitations: 教师模型设计与预训练数据细节未在摘要中说明；模型在更多样化音乐风格和长音频上的泛化能力待验证；对生成任务的适用性未提及。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 论文直接针对音乐理解与音乐表示学习，采用自监督音频预训练，与研究方向的核心关键词高度匹配，包括音乐信息检索、音乐编码器、音乐理解、自监督音频表示等。

papers.title: WordVoice: Explicit and Decoupled Multi-Dimensional Word-Level Control for LLM-Based TTS
papers.summary: While recent Large Language Model (LLM)-based Text-to-Speech (TTS) systems have achieved remarkable naturalness, they predominantly rely on implicit end-to-end generation paradigms, resulting in coarse-grained control. In scenarios demanding precise stylistic interventions and strict temporal alignment, such as audiobook narration and video dubbing, the inability to explicitly manipulate word-level acoustic attributes remains a critical bottleneck. This limitation is primarily amplified by the severe scarcity of fine-grained annotated datasets and the architectural challenge of integrating multi-dimensional control signals into discrete autoregressive generation. To address this, we propose a unified framework for highly precise word-level control. First, we construct WordVoice-5A, a massive 4.7k-hour bilingual dataset featuring five-dimensional word-level annotations (duration, boundary, energy, pitch and tone) developed through a rigorous linguistically-guided pipeline. Second, we introduce WordVoice to transform the implicit generation process into an explicit, highly controllable paradigm. Specifically, we introduce a bound-token mechanism within the LLM to formulate an explicit ``acoustic planning'' process, enabling adaptive multi-task prosodic planning and flexible manual intervention. Furthermore, we augment the token-to-waveform stage with a fine-grained acoustic modulation module, bridging the resolution gap to strictly align word-level attributes between highly compressed discrete tokens and continuous waveforms. Extensive experiments demonstrate that WordVoice achieves superior, decoupled control over multiple acoustic dimensions while maintaining competitive zero-shot synthesis stability. The code and audio samples are publicly available at https://xxh333.github.io/wordvoice-demo/.
papers.justification: 论文提出WordVoice框架，实现LLM-based TTS的词级多维显式控制，构建大规模标注数据集，创新性地引入bound-token机制和细粒度声学调制模块，与生成式语音技术方向高度相关，工作扎实且具有重要应用价值。

chinese_summary.problem: LLM-based TTS系统缺乏词级声学属性的显式解耦控制，难以满足有声书、视频配音等场景对精细风格干预和严格时间对齐的需求。
chinese_summary.method: 构建4.7k小时双语词级五维（时长、边界、能量、音高、音调）标注数据集WordVoice-5A；提出WordVoice框架，在LLM中引入bound-token机制实现显式声学规划，支持多任务韵律规划和人工干预；在token-to-waveform阶段增加细粒度声学调制模块，缩小离散token与连续波形间的分辨率差距，实现词级属性的严格对齐。
chinese_summary.innovation: 将LLM-TTS的隐式生成转化为显式、高度可控的范式，通过bound-token机制构建声学规划过程，允许自适应多任务韵律规划和灵活手动干预；设计细粒度声学调制模块，弥合高压缩离散token与连续波形之间的分辨率鸿沟，实现多维声学属性的解耦控制。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要提及大量实验表明WordVoice在多个声学维度上实现了优越的解耦控制，并保持了竞争力的零样本合成稳定性；代码和音频样本已公开。但未给出具体客观指标。
chinese_summary.limitations: 摘要未提供MOS等客观评测数据，解耦控制的独立性和稳定性需全文验证；五维标注的质量及覆盖范围可能影响泛化性。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 直接匹配研究方向中的语音合成和TTS，尤其关注LLM-based TTS系统的可控生成，属于生成式语音技术的重要组成部分。论文针对词级显式控制，弥补了当前系统在精细风格调节上的不足，与研究方向高度相关。

papers.title: PS4: Proxy-Supervised Joint Training for Real Target Speaker Extraction
papers.summary: Training target speaker extraction (TSE) models for real conversational mixtures remains challenging because large-scale training corpora and clean target speech for supervision are unavailable. We present PS4, a proxy-supervised training framework for TSE in real conversational mixtures, with two main contributions. First, we construct a large-scale corpus of 71,771 training samples derived from four public datasets, covering both Chinese and English scenarios. Each sample contains an overlapping speech mixture, per-speaker enrollment audio, a ground-truth transcript, and frame-level voice activity labels. Second, we propose a proxy-supervised joint training strategy that fine-tunes a BSRNN-based TSE model using four complementary differentiable objectives: ASR cross-entropy, speaker similarity, frame-level voice activity detection, and perceptual audio quality. Starting from a publicly available pre-trained checkpoint, only the BSRNN separator is updated during fine-tuning. On the REAL-T challenge leaderboard, PS4 ranks 2nd overall, achieving the best speaker similarity and timing F1 among all submitted systems.
papers.topic_name: Speech Separation and Target Speaker Extraction
papers.justification: 论文针对真实对话场景的目标说话人提取（TSE），提出无需干净参考的代理监督联合训练框架PS4，构建大规模多语种语料，在REAL-T挑战赛获第二名，与研究方向高度相关且贡献扎实。

chinese_summary.problem: 如何在缺乏干净目标语音监督的真实对话混合中有效训练目标说话人提取模型，以应对大规模真实数据的标注和泛化挑战。
chinese_summary.method: 提出代理监督联合训练框架PS4，首先通过整合四个公开数据集构建大规模中英文混合训练语料（含注册音频、转录文本和帧级VAD标签）；然后基于BSRNN分离器，联合优化ASR交叉熵、说话人相似度、帧级VAD和感知音频质量四个可微目标，仅微调解离器参数。
chinese_summary.innovation: 1) 构建首个大规模中英文真实对话混合数据集，提供注册音频、转录和VAD标签的多模态监督；2) 提出无需干净目标语音的代理监督联合训练策略，通过多个辅助任务替代传统信号级监督，缓解真实场景下的标注瓶颈；3) 在真实挑战REAL-T中验证有效性，取得最佳说话人相似度和时序F1。
chinese_summary.evidence: 在REAL-T挑战排行榜上总体排名第二，并取得所有系统中最佳说话人相似度和时序F1；训练集规模达71,771样本。
chinese_summary.limitations: 方法重度依赖预训练模型且只微调节点，泛化至其他分离架构或非预训练场景未验证；代理监督损失与最终提取性能的因果关系需全文分析；未与使用干净监督的TSE模型公平对比。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 精准匹配研究方向关键词“目标说话人提取”，且关注真实场景下的训练挑战，与我的盲源分离、端到端分离方法研究直接相关；其中的联合训练和代理监督思路可借鉴至其它分离范式。

papers.title: AudioLDM 2: Learning Holistic Audio Generation With Self-Supervised Pretraining
papers.summary: Although audio generation shares commonalities across different types of audio, such as speech, music, and sound effects, designing models for each type requires careful consideration of specific objectives and biases that can significantly differ from those of other types. To bring us closer to a unified perspective of audio generation, this paper proposes a holistic framework that utilizes the same learning method for speech, music, and sound effect generation. Our framework utilizes a general representation of audio, called “language of audio” (LOA). Any audio can be translated into LOA based on AudioMAE, a self-supervised pre-trained representation learning model. In the generation process, we translate other modalities into LOA by using a GPT-2 model, and we perform self-supervised audio generation learning with a latent diffusion model conditioned on the LOA of audio in our training set. The proposed framework naturally brings advantages such as reusable self-supervised pretrained latent diffusion models. Experiments on the major benchmarks of text-to-audio, text-to-music, and text-to-speech with three AudioLDM 2 variants demonstrate competitive performance of the AudioLDM 2 framework against previous approaches.
categories: IEEE/ACM Transactions on Audio Speech and Language Processing
papers.venue: IEEE/ACM Transactions on Audio Speech and Language Processing
papers.justification: 该文提出了基于自监督预训练的统一音频生成框架，覆盖语音、音乐和音效，对生成式语音技术与音乐生成有重要基础影响，高度相关于生成式语音技术及音乐信息检索与表示方向。

chinese_summary.problem: 如何构建一个统一的音频生成框架，以同一学习方法同时处理语音、音乐和音效生成，避免为每种音频类型单独设计模型。
chinese_summary.method: 提出“语言音频”（LOA）作为通用音频表示，该表示基于自监督预训练模型 AudioMAE 提取；在生成时，先用 GPT-2 将其他模态映射为 LOA，再以 LOA 为条件训练潜在扩散模型进行自监督音频生成，从而复用预训练组件。
chinese_summary.innovation: 通过引入语言音频（LOA）统一不同音频类型的表示，使得语音、音乐和音效生成可共享同一学习框架；利用自监督预训练的 AudioMAE 和可复用的潜扩散模型，避免从零开始设计特定类型模型。
chinese_summary.evidence: 在文本到音频、文本到音乐和文本到语音三个主流基准上，用三种 AudioLDM 2 变体进行了实验，声称与先前方法相比具有竞争性表现，但摘要未提供具体指标。
chinese_summary.limitations: 生成性能的细节（如客观指标、主观评估）未在摘要中给出；LOA 表示对音乐生成的下游任务（如旋律、和弦控制）的适用性未知；需要阅读全文确认模型是否在纯音乐表示学习任务上进行了验证。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 论文涉及音乐生成和自监督音频表示学习，与研究方向的 music generation、audio representation learning、self-supervised audio 相关，但核心贡献在于统一生成框架，而非音乐信息检索或表示质量评估，直接相关性较低。

papers.title: MusicLM: Generating Music From Text
papers.summary: We introduce MusicLM, a model generating high-fidelity music from text descriptions such as"a calming violin melody backed by a distorted guitar riff". MusicLM casts the process of conditional music generation as a hierarchical sequence-to-sequence modeling task, and it generates music at 24 kHz that remains consistent over several minutes. Our experiments show that MusicLM outperforms previous systems both in audio quality and adherence to the text description. Moreover, we demonstrate that MusicLM can be conditioned on both text and a melody in that it can transform whistled and hummed melodies according to the style described in a text caption. To support future research, we publicly release MusicCaps, a dataset composed of 5.5k music-text pairs, with rich text descriptions provided by human experts.
papers.justification: 提出了基于文本描述生成高保真音乐的分层序列到序列模型MusicLM，发布MusicCaps数据集，在音乐生成领域具有里程碑意义，与音乐信息检索和生成方向高度相关，是必读级基础工作。

chinese_summary.problem: 从文本描述生成高保真音乐，并支持旋律条件的风格化生成，即根据文本提示将哼唱或口哨旋律转换为特定风格音乐。
chinese_summary.method: MusicLM将条件音乐生成建模为分层序列到序列任务，通过自回归与离散音频表示，从文本和可选旋律输入生成24kHz音乐，整体流程为编码文本-旋律，解码为多层级音频token序列。
chinese_summary.innovation: 首次实现从文本生成分钟级高保真音乐；提出分层序列建模整合文本与旋律条件；公开带有丰富人类标注的音乐-文本数据集MusicCaps。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要提及实验表明在音频质量和文本描述一致性上超越先前系统；提供了自定义数据集MusicCaps有5.5k音乐-文本对，但未给出具体指标。
chinese_summary.limitations: 音乐生成和语音生成任务不同，方法迁移性待验证；旋律条件仅展示哼唱转换，未提及对说话人音色或语音内容的影响；生成模型的具体架构（如是否使用扩散或流匹配）未披露。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 研究方向要求生成式语音技术，MusicLM虽为音乐生成，但其分层序列到序列条件生成范式可能部分适用于语音合成或生成式语音模型；摘要未直接涉及语音增强、神经声码器等核心关键词，且生成对象为音乐而非语音，因此匹配度低，建议人工确认是否有借鉴价值。

papers.title: ICASSP 2023 Deep Noise Suppression Challenge
papers.summary: The ICASSP 2023 Deep Noise Suppression (DNS) Challenge marks the fifth edition of the DNS challenge series. DNS challenges were organized from 2019 to 2023 to foster research in the field of DNS. Previous DNS challenges were held at INTERSPEECH 2020, ICASSP 2021, INTERSPEECH 2021, and ICASSP 2022. This challenge aims to advance models capable of jointly addressing denoising, dereverberation, and interfering talker suppression, with separate tracks focusing on headset and speakerphone scenarios. The challenge facilitates personalized deep noise suppression by providing accompanying enrollment clips for each test clip, each containing the primary talker only, which can be used to compute a speaker identity feature and disentangle primary and interfering speech. While the majority of models submitted to the challenge were personalized, the same teams emerged as the winners in both tracks. The best models demonstrated improvements of 0.145 and 0.141 in the challenge's score, respectively, when compared to the noisy blind test set. We present additional analysis and draw comparisons to previous challenges.
categories: IEEE Open Journal of Signal Processing
papers.venue: IEEE Open Journal of Signal Processing
papers.justification: DNS挑战是语音增强领域的核心基准，直接推动去噪、去混响和干扰抑制研究，与研究方向高度匹配且影响力显著。

chinese_summary.problem: 该论文为DNS挑战赛的总结性描述，旨在汇报赛事组织、参赛模型性能对比及趋势，并非提出或解决一个具体的技术问题。
chinese_summary.method: 论文概述了ICASSP 2023 DNS挑战赛的设定：包含头戴式和扬声器两个赛道，要求模型联合处理降噪、去混响和干扰说话人抑制；提供说话人注册音频以支持个性化降噪。未涉及参赛模型的具体架构或算法细节。
chinese_summary.innovation: 本文无算法创新，属于挑战赛综述；其价值在于展示基于个性化信息的深度噪声抑制已成为主流方向，并给出官方基准和最优结果的数值对比。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要中给出了可核验的定量结果：最佳模型在挑战赛评分上相对带噪盲测集分别提升0.145和0.141。
chinese_summary.limitations: 论文为挑战赛概述，不含任何具体的模型结构、训练策略或消融实验；无法从中获取可复现的方法细节。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 研究方向命中关键词降噪、去混响，但本论文仅为赛事总结，不涉及具体前端处理技术，与日常的算法研究关联度低，建议人工复核后决定是否需要阅读全文以了解领域进展。

papers.title: SpeechX: Neural Codec Language Model as a Versatile Speech Transformer
papers.summary: Recent advancements in generative speech models based on audio-text prompts have enabled remarkable innovations like high-quality zero-shot text-to-speech. However, existing models still face limitations in handling diverse audio-text speech generation tasks involving transforming input speech and processing audio captured in adverse acoustic conditions. This paper introduces SpeechX, a versatile speech generation model capable of zero-shot TTS and various speech transformation tasks, dealing with both clean and noisy signals. SpeechX combines neural codec language modeling with multi-task learning using task-dependent prompting, enabling unified and extensible modeling and providing a consistent way for leveraging textual input in speech enhancement and transformation tasks. Experimental results show SpeechX's efficacy in various tasks, including zero-shot TTS, noise suppression, target speaker extraction, speech removal, and speech editing with or without background noise, achieving comparable or superior performance to specialized models across tasks.
categories: IEEE/ACM Transactions on Audio Speech and Language Processing
papers.venue: IEEE/ACM Transactions on Audio Speech and Language Processing
papers.justification: SpeechX提出基于神经编解码语言模型的统一框架，在零样本文本到语音、语音增强、目标说话人提取等任务中表现优异，与生成式语音技术及语音增强/分离方向高度相关，是重要基线工作。

chinese_summary.problem: 现有语音生成模型难以统一处理多种语音转换任务，尤其是在处理含噪语音的增强与编辑方面存在局限。SpeechX 旨在提供一个统一的框架，同时支持零样本 TTS、语音增强与转换等任务。
chinese_summary.method: 结合神经编解码语言模型与多任务学习，首先将语音信号离散化为编解码器编码，然后通过任务相关提示（task-dependent prompting）控制语言模型生成目标语音，实现包括噪声抑制、目标说话人提取等任务。
chinese_summary.innovation: 提出统一框架 SpeechX，将语音增强、分离、编辑和 TTS 等任务整合到神经编解码语言模型中；引入任务提示机制实现多任务学习，无需为每个任务设计专用模型；实验证明该通用模型在多个任务上能达到或超过专用模型的性能。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要声称 SpeechX 在零样本 TTS、噪声抑制、目标说话人提取、语音移除和带噪语音编辑等任务上取得与专用模型相当或更优的性能，但未提供具体实验指标。
chinese_summary.limitations: 计算复杂度未知，可能不适合实时前端处理；生成式模型在增强任务中可能引入内容变化或伪影；未提及去混响、回声消除等典型前端任务；需确认对多通道输入的兼容性。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 论文明确涉及噪声抑制（noise suppression）任务，与研究方向中的降噪、语音增强高度相关。但该方法属于生成式模型，而研究方向侧重于传统前端和神经网络降噪，可能需要人工判断生成式增强是否适合音频前端。

papers.title: MP-SENet: A Speech Enhancement Model with Parallel Denoising of Magnitude and Phase Spectra
papers.summary: This paper proposes MP-SENet, a novel Speech Enhancement Network which directly denoises Magnitude and Phase spectra in parallel. The proposed MP-SENet adopts a codec architecture in which the encoder and decoder are bridged by convolution-augmented transformers. The encoder aims to encode time-frequency representations from the input noisy magnitude and phase spectra. The decoder is composed of parallel magnitude mask decoder and phase decoder, directly recovering clean magnitude spectra and clean-wrapped phase spectra by incorporating learnable sigmoid activation and parallel phase estimation architecture, respectively. Multi-level losses defined on magnitude spectra, phase spectra, short-time complex spectra, and time-domain waveforms are used to train the MP-SENet model jointly. Experimental results show that our proposed MP-SENet achieves a PESQ of 3.50 on the public VoiceBank+DEMAND dataset and outperforms existing advanced speech enhancement methods.
papers.justification: 论文提出MP-SENet，并行估计幅度和相位谱进行语音增强，性能先进且引用较高，是语音增强领域的代表性工作，与我的研究方向高度相关，属于必读级别。

chinese_summary.problem: 传统语音增强方法通常仅估计幅度谱，相位信息保留带噪相位或单独处理，导致语音质量受限。MP-SENet旨在直接并行去噪幅度和相位谱，以更准确地恢复干净语音。
chinese_summary.method: MP-SENet采用编解码架构，编码器和解码器之间通过卷积增强的Transformer连接。编码器对输入的噪声幅度和相位谱进行时频编码；解码器由并行的幅度掩码解码器和相位解码器构成，幅度掩码解码器利用可学习sigmoid激活生成幅度掩码，相位解码器通过并行相位估计架构直接恢复包裹相位。训练使用多级损失函数，包括幅度谱损失、相位谱损失、短时复数谱损失和时域波形损失。
chinese_summary.innovation: 提出并行去噪幅度与相位谱的语音增强框架，不同于传统的仅幅度或串行处理方式；在编解码结构中引入卷积增强Transformer，提升时频建模能力；设计了涵盖幅度、相位、复数谱和波形的多级联合损失，促进信号级保真。
chinese_summary.evidence: 在VoiceBank+DEMAND数据集上，MP-SENet达到PESQ 3.50，声称优于现有先进语音增强方法，但未列出具体对比方法或消融实验。
chinese_summary.limitations: 仅在单一数据集上评估，泛化性未验证；未提及模型参数量、推理速度等计算资源需求；并行相位估计的具体架构及其对包裹相位的处理细节需查阅全文。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 论文直接针对语音增强中的幅度和相位去噪问题，与我的研究方向高度契合，匹配关键词：speech enhancement, noise suppression, neural masking；所提方法可归入音频前端处理范畴，对提升降噪性能有直接价值。

papers.title: Schrödinger Bridge for Generative Speech Enhancement
papers.summary: This paper proposes a generative speech enhancement model based on Schr\"odinger bridge (SB). The proposed model is employing a tractable SB to formulate a data-to-data process between the clean speech distribution and the observed noisy speech distribution. The model is trained with a data prediction loss, aiming to recover the complex-valued clean speech coefficients, and an auxiliary time-domain loss is used to improve training of the model. The effectiveness of the proposed SB-based model is evaluated in two different speech enhancement tasks: speech denoising and speech dereverberation. The experimental results demonstrate that the proposed SB-based outperforms diffusion-based models in terms of speech quality metrics and ASR performance, e.g., resulting in relative word error rate reduction of 20% for denoising and 6% for dereverberation compared to the best baseline model. The proposed model also demonstrates improved efficiency, achieving better quality than the baselines for the same number of sampling steps and with a reduced computational cost.
papers.justification: 提出基于薛定谔桥的生成式语音增强新范式，在去噪和去混响上超越扩散模型，属于生成式语音增强方向的必读工作，高度相关且有影响力。

chinese_summary.problem: 在语音增强任务（去噪和去混响）中，现有扩散模型存在计算成本和采样效率问题，论文旨在通过Schrödinger桥构建更高效且高质量的生成模型。
chinese_summary.method: 采用可处理的Schrödinger桥公式化干净语音分布与带噪语音分布之间的数据到数据过程，使用数据预测损失恢复复数域干净语音系数，并引入辅助时域损失改善训练。
chinese_summary.innovation: 首次将Schrödinger桥应用于语音增强，直接在成对数据分布间建模，避免了扩散模型从噪声到数据的逆向过程；相比扩散模型，在相同采样步数下获得更高质量，且计算成本更低。
chinese_summary.evidence: 在语音去噪和去混响任务上实验，相对于最佳基线，去噪任务词错误率降低20%，去混响降低6%，同时展示了更高的效率（相同步数下质量更优，计算量减少）。
chinese_summary.limitations: 仅在Interspeech风格摘要中汇报，未说明测试集规模和具体噪声/混响条件，泛化性待验证；未提及是否适用于回声消除等其他语音增强子任务；辅助时域损失的权重和具体形式未披露。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 论文直接针对语音增强的核心任务（去噪、去混响），与我研究方向中的语音增强、语音去噪、去混响关键词高度吻合，且提出的生成模型框架可能对音频前端处理提供新范式。

papers.title: Diffusion Models for Audio Restoration: A review [Special Issue On Model-Based and Data-Driven Audio Signal Processing]
papers.summary: With the development of audio playback devices and fast data transmission, the demand for high sound quality is rising for both entertainment and communications. In this quest for better sound quality, challenges emerge from distortions and interferences originating at the recording side or caused by an imperfect transmission pipeline. To address this problem, audio restoration methods aim to recover clean sound signals from the corrupted input data. We present here audio restoration algorithms based on diffusion models, with a focus on speech enhancement and music restoration tasks. Traditional approaches, often grounded in handcrafted rules and statistical heuristics, have shaped our understanding of audio signals. In the past decades, there has been a notable shift toward data-driven methods that exploit the modeling capabilities of deep neural networks (DNNs). Deep generative models, and among them diffusion models, have emerged as powerful techniques for learning complex data distributions. However, relying solely on DNN-based learning approaches carries the risk of reducing interpretability, particularly when employing end-to-end models. Nonetheless, data-driven approaches allow more flexibility in comparison to statistical model-based frameworks, whose performance depends on distributional and statistical assumptions that can be difficult to guarantee. Here, we aim to show that diffusion models can combine the best of both worlds and offer the opportunity to design audio restoration algorithms with a good degree of interpretability and a remarkable performance in terms of sound quality. In this article, we review the use of diffusion models for audio restoration. We explain the diffusion formalism and its application to the conditional generation of clean audio signals. We believe that diffusion models open an exciting field of research with the potential to spawn new audio restoration algorithms that are natural-sounding and remain robust in difficult acoustic situations.
papers.justification: 综述扩散模型在音频修复（核心是语音增强与声音恢复）中的应用，与生成式语音技术方向高度相关，内容系统且具有基础影响力，是必读文献。

chinese_summary.problem: 音频信号在录制或传输时引入失真和干扰，需恢复纯净语音和音乐信号。
chinese_summary.method: 采用扩散模型进行音频恢复，利用其学习复杂数据分布的能力，通过条件生成从受损输入中重建干净音频，结合了统计模型的可解释性与深度神经网络的灵活性。
chinese_summary.innovation: 扩散模型在音频恢复中融合了传统统计建模与深度学习的优势，既保持了一定的可解释性，又提升了合成音质，且在困难声学场景下具有鲁棒性。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要为综述性质，未提供具体实验数据或系统验证。
chinese_summary.limitations: 综述未涉及具体算法实现细节和量化评估，对回声消除、去混响等音频前端任务的覆盖可能不足，需阅读全文确认是否包含针对性讨论。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 本文以语音增强为主要应用之一，与研究方向高度匹配；扩散模型作为一种前沿生成模型，可能为语音增强提供新思路，但综述泛在介绍扩散模型，对音频前端特有任务（如残差回声抑制）的着墨可能有限。

papers.title: Best-of-$N$ TTS Evaluation is Confounded by ASR Family Alignment
papers.summary: Best-of-$N$ (BoN) inference improves content consistency in zero-shot text-to-speech by selecting from $N$ candidates with an automatic speech recognition (ASR) verifier. We identify an underexplored evaluation confound: a verifier's apparent quality depends strongly on which ASR family judges it. On LibriSpeech-PC test-clean~\citep{librispeechpc} with F5-TTS~\citep{f5tts}, verifier rankings reverse across Whisper, wav2vec~2.0, and HuBERT evaluators, and same-family verifier-evaluator pairs recover 2-3$\times$ more oracle headroom than cross-family pairs despite near-identical representations (linear CKA $0.978$) -- a pattern consistent with identity- or lineage-level coupling rather than representational overlap. We propose two \textbf{cross-family rank ensembles} (rank-averaging and conjunctive max-rank) that attain the lowest mean WER across three independent evaluators -- $1.61\%$ at $N{=}10$ ($-12\%$ relative to F5-TTS) -- with no measurable degradation under automatic SIM-o/UTMOS metrics; the best single verifier drives WER from $2.06\%$ to $1.72\%$ ($-16.5\%$) under the official F5-TTS evaluator. We recommend cross-evaluator triangulation as default reporting practice.
papers.justification: 论文揭示TTS评估中ASR验证器的家族偏差并提出跨家族集成方法，直接属于生成式语音技术子方向，工作扎实且具重要实践意义，对TTS研究者是必读。

chinese_summary.problem: 本文识别并解决Best-of-N TTS评估中因ASR验证器与评估器家族对齐导致的评分混淆问题，即同一ASR家族的验证器在评估时获得虚高的性能优势。
chinese_summary.method: 提出两种跨家族排名集成方法：rank-averaging（平均排名）和conjunctive max-rank（联合最大排名），通过组合不同ASR家族的验证器来生成更鲁棒的候选排序，从而在不同评估器下稳定降低WER。
chinese_summary.innovation: 首次指出ASR家族对齐是BoN TTS评估的显著混淆变量，并实验证实同一家族验证器-评估器对可恢复额外2-3倍oracle性能；提出并验证了跨家族排名集成作为缓解方法，无需修改TTS模型即可获得稳健的评估。
chinese_summary.evidence: 在LibriSpeech-PC test-clean上用F5-TTS进行实验，Whisper、wav2vec 2.0、HuBERT评估器间验证器排名反转，同家族配对oracle回收倍数2-3x，跨家族集成在N=10时平均WER为1.61%（较F5-TTS降低12%），最佳单一验证器在官方评估器下WER从2.06%降至1.72%（降低16.5%）。
chinese_summary.limitations: 实验仅基于F5-TTS单一模型和LibriSpeech-PC数据集，泛化性待验证；未考虑评估器在自然度等主观指标上的影响；跨家族集成可能增加计算开销。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 直接聚焦TTS评估，与研究方向'Generative Speech Technology'中的'speech synthesis and TTS'高度相关；评估方法的改进有助于生成语音质量判断，可能影响扩散模型或流匹配等生成方法的设计优化。

papers.title: It Takes Few to TANGO: A Quantized Distributed Model for Binaural Speech Enhancement
papers.summary: Neural network-based multichannel speech enhancement systems achieve strong enhancement performance, but their computational and memory requirements limit deployment on resource-constrained devices. This paper investigates low-precision inference for TANGO, a hybrid distributed binaural speech enhancement system combining neural mask estimation with spatial filtering. We evaluate post-training quantization and quantization-aware training for the neural components, and analyze how quantization errors in the mask estimators propagate through the downstream spatial filtering stage. Our analysis shows that, although quantization degrades intermediate mask estimates, the spatial filtering stage compensates for most quantization-induced errors. Leveraging this robustness, we simplify TANGO into MN-TANGO, reducing both model size and computational complexity while maintaining comparable final performance. By combining INT8 weight-and-activation quantization with ERB compression and grouped recurrent layers, the most compact MN-TANGO reaches 4.65 MMAC/s and 0.177 MB.
papers.justification: 该工作针对双耳语音增强的量化部署，分析了量化误差在空间滤波阶段的鲁棒性，并提出了简化模型MN-TANGO，显著降低了计算和存储开销，与麦克风阵列波束成形及语音增强方向高度相关，质量扎实，实用性强。

chinese_summary.problem: 论文研究在资源受限设备上部署神经多通道语音增强系统时，量化推理如何影响双耳语音增强系统TANGO的性能，并探索利用空间滤波的鲁棒性进行模型压缩。
chinese_summary.method: 核心方法：对TANGO系统（混合分布式双耳语音增强，结合神经掩膜估计与空间滤波）的神经部分进行训练后量化（PTQ）和量化感知训练（QAT），分析量化误差在空间滤波阶段的传播，并基于空间滤波的补偿能力简化网络，得到更紧凑的MN-TANGO（如采用INT8量化、ERB压缩和分组循环层）。
chinese_summary.innovation: 首次系统研究量化对混合神经‑空间滤波语音增强系统的影响，揭示空间滤波对神经网络量化误差的补偿效应；利用该鲁棒性设计出轻量级模型MN‑TANGO，显著降低计算量（4.65 MMAC/s）和存储（0.177 MB），同时保持相近的最终增强性能。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要中进行了量化误差传播分析，表明尽管量化降低中间掩膜估计质量，但空间滤波能补偿大部分误差；给出了最终紧凑模型的规格，但未提供具体性能指标对比。
chinese_summary.limitations: 仅针对双耳（两通道）场景，泛化至更多麦克风阵列未验证；量化鲁棒性依赖于TANGO特定的空间滤波设计；摘要未给出性能下降的具体数值，最终增强质量是否真正可比需确认。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 论文直接涉及多通道语音增强（双耳为两通道）、空间滤波（波束成形关键步骤）以及神经波束成形系统在资源受限场景的部署，与研究方向中的关键词“multichannel speech enhancement”“spatial filtering”等高度匹配，对神经波束成形的实际落地有参考价值，但主要贡献在模型量化而非算法创新，因此相关性中等。

papers.title: STARSS23: An Audio-Visual Dataset of Spatial Recordings of Real Scenes with Spatiotemporal Annotations of Sound Events
papers.summary: While direction of arrival (DOA) of sound events is generally estimated from multichannel audio data recorded in a microphone array, sound events usually derive from visually perceptible source objects, e.g., sounds of footsteps come from the feet of a walker. This paper proposes an audio-visual sound event localization and detection (SELD) task, which uses multichannel audio and video information to estimate the temporal activation and DOA of target sound events. Audio-visual SELD systems can detect and localize sound events using signals from a microphone array and audio-visual correspondence. We also introduce an audio-visual dataset, Sony-TAu Realistic Spatial Soundscapes 2023 (STARSS23), which consists of multichannel audio data recorded with a microphone array, video data, and spatiotemporal annotation of sound events. Sound scenes in STARSS23 are recorded with instructions, which guide recording participants to ensure adequate activity and occurrences of sound events. STARSS23 also serves human-annotated temporal activation labels and human-confirmed DOA labels, which are based on tracking results of a motion capture system. Our benchmark results demonstrate the benefits of using visual object positions in audio-visual SELD tasks. The data is available at https://zenodo.org/record/7880637.
papers.justification: 提出音频-视觉声音事件定位与检测数据集，结合多通道音频与视觉信息进行声源DOA估计，与麦克风阵列与声源定位方向相关，但作为数据集论文对基础方法的贡献有限。

chinese_summary.problem: 提出音视频结合的声音事件定位与检测任务，利用多通道音频和视频信息估计声音事件的时域激活和到达方向。
chinese_summary.method: 引入音视频 SELD 系统，融合麦克风阵列信号与视觉目标位置，通过跨模态对应关系进行联合定位；构建并公开发布 STARSS23 数据集，提供运动捕捉系统验证的 DOA 标注。
chinese_summary.innovation: 首次将视觉信息系统性地引入 SELD 任务，突破纯音频 DOA 估计的局限；提供包含真实场景多通道音频、视频及精确时空标注的数据集，并利用运动捕捉系统确认 DOA 标签，提升标注可靠性。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要中提及基准测试结果表明使用视觉目标位置对音视频 SELD 任务有益，但未给出具体指标。
chinese_summary.limitations: 未明确说明音视频融合的具体模型架构、是否需要波束形成预处理，以及仅在受控录制场景下的泛化能力。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 论文涉及麦克风阵列和到达方向估计，与研究方向的关键词匹配，但核心聚焦于音视频数据集与跨模态定位，非波束形成或空间滤波方法，需人工核实是否包含多通道增强技术。

papers.title: Deep Learning-Based DOA Estimation
papers.summary: Direction-of-arrival (DOA) estimation is a vital research topic in array signal processing, with extensive applications in many fields. In recent years, deep learning has been applied to DOA estimation to improve the performance. However, most existing deep learning-based DOA estimation methods extract DOA information from the covariance matrix (CM) input. In this paper, we introduce a novel deep learning-based DOA estimation scheme that utilizes the raw in-phase (I) and quadrature (Q) components of the signal as the input. We formulate the problem as single-label classification and multi-label classification based on the number of signal sources. We design a convolutional neural network to solve the problems and to adapt to different number of snapshots. We also propose a deep learning regression-based method to overcome the limitations of classify-based methods in dealing with off-grid angles. We conduct extensive experiments with simulations and over-the-air collected signals to analyze the performance of the proposed method in various scenarios including different SNRs, additive generalized Gaussian noise (AGGN) and extreme multi-source DOA estimation. Results demonstrate that our proposed method outperforms the existing deep learning-based DOA estimation methods.
categories: IEEE Transactions on Cognitive Communications and Networking
papers.venue: IEEE Transactions on Cognitive Communications and Networking
papers.justification: 论文提出基于原始I/Q信号的深度学习DOA估计新方法，与麦克风阵列与波束形成方向高度相关，实验验证充分；但作为经典赛道论文，引用数尚可（94），尚未成为领域内广泛使用的基线方法。

chinese_summary.problem: 现有基于深度学习的DOA估计方法大多依赖协方差矩阵作为输入，缺乏对原始信号直接利用的研究。
chinese_summary.method: 提出一种直接使用原始I/Q信号作为输入的深度学习DOA估计方案。将问题建模为单标签和多标签分类以处理不同信源数，设计CNN适应不同快拍数，并引入回归方法解决离网角估计。
chinese_summary.innovation: 首次以原始I/Q信号代替协方差矩阵作为网络输入，保留了信号的完整相位信息；通过分类与回归结合统一处理单源/多源与离网角问题；网络结构能灵活适应不同快拍数。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要中明确进行了大量仿真和实际空口信号采集实验，验证了在不同信噪比、广义高斯噪声和极端多源场景下的性能提升，优于现有深度学习方法。
chinese_summary.limitations: 主要基于I/Q信号模型，可能面向通信接收场景，未提及麦克风阵列或语音信号，其泛化到声学领域的效果需通过全文确认。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 匹配研究方向中的DOA估计、阵列信号处理关键词；但论文侧重通信信号，与麦克风阵列语音处理在信号模型上存在差异，需要人工复核迁移可行性。

papers.title: A Survey of Sound Source Localization and Detection Methods and Their Applications
papers.summary: This study is a survey of sound source localization and detection methods. The study provides a detailed classification of the methods used in the fields of science mentioned above. It classifies sound source localization systems based on criteria found in the literature. Moreover, an analysis of classic methods based on the propagation model and methods based on machine learning and deep learning techniques has been carried out. Attention has been paid to providing the most detailed information on the possibility of using physical phenomena, mathematical relationships, and artificial intelligence to determine sound source localization. Additionally, the article underscores the significance of these methods within both military and civil contexts. The study culminates with a discussion of forthcoming trends in the realms of acoustic detection and localization. The primary objective of this research is to serve as a valuable resource for selecting the most suitable approach within this domain.
papers.justification: 该综述系统梳理了麦克风阵列声源定位的经典与深度学习方法，与研究方向高度相关，但作为综述缺乏原创方法，引用量中等。

chinese_summary.problem: 对现有声源定位与检测方法进行分类和综述，为领域内选择合适方法提供参考资源。
chinese_summary.method: 按文献中的标准对声源定位系统进行分类，详细分析了基于传播模型的经典方法和基于机器学习/深度学习的方法，并探讨了物理现象、数学关系和人工智能的利用方式。
chinese_summary.innovation: 提供一种综合的分类视角，同时覆盖经典与数据驱动方法，并强调军事和民用应用的意义。但作为综述，具体创新点不足。
chinese_summary.evidence: 摘要中无实验、理论或系统证据；论文为综述性研究，证据不足。
chinese_summary.limitations: 可能未深入麦克风阵列或波束成形等特定技术；综述覆盖范围可能较宽泛，针对性有限；需阅读全文确认是否包含空间滤波、MVDR等阵列处理方法的详细讨论。
chinese_summary.why_relevant: 声源定位是我的研究方向关键词之一，综述可能包含与麦克风阵列和波束成形相关的定位技术，但由于摘要未明确提及阵列信号处理，需人工复核内容覆盖度。
